name: Complyance
oneliner: Complyance deploys AI agents to automate governance, risk, and data compliance workflows — integrating directly into enterprise tech stacks and running custom checks against risk thresholds before flagging issues for human review.
finserv: Mastercard as an angel investor signals direct financial services interest and distribution potential; GRC automation with AI agents directly addresses compliance operations challenges at banks, asset managers, and payment networks; Anthropic angel backing adds AI-native credibility
team: Backed by GV (Google Ventures) as Series A lead, Speedinvest, Everywhere Ventures, and angels from Anthropic and Mastercard. Total raised: $28M.
thesis: This is a direct play in your core Compliance gap. Complyance is building what you would want a partner to handle: the AI-native GRC layer that plugs into existing enterprise systems and runs compliance checks autonomously. As regulated infrastructure, you could position above Complyance — providing the financial identity and authorisation layer through which Complyance's agents operate, or partner to offer a bundled compliance stack to financial institutions deploying agents.
